title: lazy_dog
description: This mod is the ultimate lazy-player's dream. You can even craft End Portal Frames directly, and it adds a full set of armor, a sword, and a special powder
body:
这个模组非常懒狗，新增一套护甲、一把剑和一个粉，有天量buff，非常高能，装备以后就无敌了！你甚至可以合成出末地传送门框架，直通末地，轻松斩杀末影龙。
- 护甲的防御力很高，被生物攻击还能释放能炸死循声守卫的爆炸。
- 剑的攻击范围大，伤害高，打到敌人能霹雷。
- 吃下粉后会获得一大堆离谱buff（效果）。
- 而且这些物品是使用泥土和木棍合成的，用这款模组，三分钟通关不成问题。
 
今后会更加优化内容，也会移植更新版本，会加更多物品。

https://youtube.com/watch?v=ZirRyHdrf5s&sttick=0

This mod is the ultimate lazy-player's dream. It adds a set of armor, a sword, and a special powder—all packed with insane buffs that make you straight-up invincible! You can even craft End Portal Frames to head straight to the End and slay the Ender Dragon with zero effort.
Armor: Features massive defense and triggers a devastating explosion when you're hit, powerful enough to one-shot a Warden.
Sword: Boasts a huge attack range and high damage, summoning lightning bolts upon every hit.
Powder: Consuming it grants a long list of ridiculous buffs.
Easy Crafting: Everything is crafted using just dirt and sticks. With this mod, you can speedrun the game in under three minutes!
I'll be optimizing the content and porting it to newer versions with even more items in the future.
And the sword is in Tool & Utilities
